overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside an NCART elevated train in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The player observes the dense cyberpunk urban landscape passing by through the window, featuring brutalist concrete architecture, holographic advertisements, and heavy neon signage. The journey progresses from open urban canyons through commercial districts before arriving at Elliot Place station.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train interior passing through dense urban canyon

agents.ego_description: seated inside the train cabin, observing the passing cityscape through the window

notable_agents.action: woman in orange top sitting and looking out the window

entered.detail: rusted vertical support column inside the train cabin
large rectangular window showing exterior city view
brutalist concrete building facade passing close to the train
glowing green holographic advertisements on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a moving elevated train, with a metal pillar framing the view through a large window. The train travels through a dense urban canyon of brutalist concrete buildings, with green neon signage visible in the distance. A female NPC sits to the left, looking out at the passing industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with heavy neon advertising and covered track sections

events.description: train enters section with dense pink neon signage and covered track areas

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the changing urban landscape as the train passes through commercial districts

notable_agents.action: woman remains seated, occasionally shifting position

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls of a covered track section
vertical magenta neon light strips on building facades
modern glass building with reflective surfaces

segments.scene_description: The train moves into a more commercial area characterized by dense pink and purple neon lighting. The track enters covered sections with concrete tunnel walls, while holographic advertisements and glass facades replace the earlier brutalist architecture. The lighting shifts to be more artificial and colorful.

scene_state.functional_zone: Elliot Place train station platform arrival area

events.description: train slows down as it approaches Elliot Place station platform
train arrives at station and comes to a complete stop

agents.ego_description: preparing to disembark as the train arrives at the station platform

notable_agents.action: woman begins to stand up as the train stops

entered.detail: concrete platform with yellow safety lines becoming visible
metal support beams and overhead structure of the station
glass safety barriers separating platform from tracks

segments.scene_description: The train decelerates as it enters Elliot Place station, transitioning from the open track to an enclosed platform environment. The platform edge and safety doors come into view on the right, while bright station lighting replaces the exterior city views. The train comes to a complete stop, ending the journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a moving train as it travels from a brutalist industrial canyon into a vibrant commercial district before arriving at a station. It begins inside the carriage, where a metal pillar frames a view of gray concrete buildings and distant green neon signage while a passenger looks out at the passing architecture. As the train progresses, the environment shifts into a dense commercial zone where the lighting transforms into vivid pinks and purples, and the open sky is replaced by covered concrete tunnels and holographic advertisements. The scene then transitions from the colorful city blur to the enclosed environment of Elliot Place station, with the platform edge and safety doors appearing on the right. Finally, the bright station lighting overrides the exterior views as the train decelerates to a complete stop.
